note: Native Community Rules page. Web-only. ZERO consensus / scripts / src changes. (A) NEW website/sost-community-rules.html (602 lines): native HTML page with the same nav + theme as the rest of sostcore.com — no GitHub UI chrome. Renders the full SOST_TALK_COMMUNITY_RULES content with anchor-link TOC: What is SOST Talk, Moderation, Allowed/Not allowed (two-column), Important reminders, Auto-responses, OTC / P2P Board Rules (hard invariants + allowed + not allowed + liability), OTC Tactical Safety Rules (three rules + scammer-vs-honest two-column + pre-trade checklist + Sentinel auto-flag list), OTC Reputation Room Rules (hard invariants + suggested posting format + Sentinel applies + what-it-is-NOT). Back-to-OTC + Open-SOST-Talk buttons at the bottom. (B) sost-otc.html Community Rules button repointed from the previously broken docs/SOST_TALK_COMMUNITY_RULES.md path (nginx does not serve docs/, so try_files silently fell through to index.html — that was the original symptom the user reported) to the new native page sost-community-rules.html. docs/SOST_TALK_COMMUNITY_RULES.md remains the canonical source; the HTML page is a rendered view of the same content.
